entries.title: Performance Monitor - Hooks

entries.seoDescription: Monitors application performance metrics, identifies bottlenecks, and provides optimization recommendations. This Stop hook provides comprehensive performanc...
entries.author: JSONbored
entries.cardDescription: Monitors application performance metrics, identifies bottlenecks, and provides optimization recommendations.
entries.copySnippet:
{
  "hooks": {
    "Stop": [
      {
        "matchers": [
          "*"
        ],
        "description": "Monitor performance metrics and provide optimization insights"
      }
    ]
  },
  "scriptContent": "#!/bin/bash

echo "🔍 Performance Monitor - Analyzing system performance..."

# Performance monitoring areas
echo "📊 Monitoring Areas:"
echo "  • Application Performance Metrics"
echo "  • Database Performance"
echo "  • Frontend Performance (Web Vitals)"
echo "  • Infrastructure Monitoring"
echo "  • Automated Performance Testing"

# Check if performance tools are available
command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ Node.js available for performance profiling"
command -v lighthouse >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ Lighthouse available for web performance"
command -v artillery >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ Artillery available for load testing"

# System performance check
echo ""
echo "💻 System Performance:"

# Memory usage
if command -v free >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    mem_usage=$(free | grep Mem | awk '{printf "%.2f", $3/$2 * 100.0}')
    echo "  Memory Usage: ${mem_usage}%"
    if (( $(echo "$mem_usage > 85" | bc -l) 2>/dev/null )); then
        echo "  🚨 High memory usage detected!"
    fi
fi

# Disk usage
disk_usage=$(df / | tail -1 | awk '{print $5}' | sed 's/%//')
echo "  Disk Usage: ${disk_usage}%"
if (( disk_usage > 90 )); then
    echo "  🚨 High disk usage detected!"
fi

# Load average
if command -v uptime >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    load_avg=$(uptime | awk -F'load average:' '{print $2}' | awk '{print $1}' | sed 's/,//')
    echo "  Load Average: $load_avg"
fi

# Performance monitoring recommendations
echo ""
echo "💡 Performance Recommendations:"
echo "  • Implement response time tracking for API endpoints"
echo "  • Set up Web Vitals monitoring for frontend performance"
echo "  • Monitor database query performance"
echo "  • Set up automated performance testing"
echo "  • Configure performance alerts and thresholds"
echo "  • Use profiling tools for bottleneck identification"
echo "  • Implement performance budgets for builds"

echo ""
echo "📋 Next Steps:"
echo "  1. Set up performance monitoring dashboards"
echo "  2. Configure performance alerts"
echo "  3. Implement automated performance testing"
echo "  4. Review and optimize identified bottlenecks"

echo ""
echo "🎯 Performance monitor analysis complete!"
echo "📊 Use monitoring data to drive optimization decisions"

exit 0"
}
entries.configSnippet:
{
  "hooks": {
    "Stop": [
      {
        "matchers": [
          "*"
        ],
        "description": "Monitor performance metrics and provide optimization insights"
      }
    ]
  },
  "scriptContent": "#!/bin/bash

echo "🔍 Performance Monitor - Analyzing system performance..."

# Performance monitoring areas
echo "📊 Monitoring Areas:"
echo "  • Application Performance Metrics"
echo "  • Database Performance"
echo "  • Frontend Performance (Web Vitals)"
echo "  • Infrastructure Monitoring"
echo "  • Automated Performance Testing"

# Check if performance tools are available
command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ Node.js available for performance profiling"
command -v lighthouse >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ Lighthouse available for web performance"
command -v artillery >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ Artillery available for load testing"

# System performance check
echo ""
echo "💻 System Performance:"

# Memory usage
if command -v free >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    mem_usage=$(free | grep Mem | awk '{printf "%.2f", $3/$2 * 100.0}')
    echo "  Memory Usage: ${mem_usage}%"
    if (( $(echo "$mem_usage > 85" | bc -l) 2>/dev/null )); then
        echo "  🚨 High memory usage detected!"
    fi
fi

# Disk usage
disk_usage=$(df / | tail -1 | awk '{print $5}' | sed 's/%//')
echo "  Disk Usage: ${disk_usage}%"
if (( disk_usage > 90 )); then
    echo "  🚨 High disk usage detected!"
fi

# Load average
if command -v uptime >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    load_avg=$(uptime | awk -F'load average:' '{print $2}' | awk '{print $1}' | sed 's/,//')
    echo "  Load Average: $load_avg"
fi

# Performance monitoring recommendations
echo ""
echo "💡 Performance Recommendations:"
echo "  • Implement response time tracking for API endpoints"
echo "  • Set up Web Vitals monitoring for frontend performance"
echo "  • Monitor database query performance"
echo "  • Set up automated performance testing"
echo "  • Configure performance alerts and thresholds"
echo "  • Use profiling tools for bottleneck identification"
echo "  • Implement performance budgets for builds"

echo ""
echo "📋 Next Steps:"
echo "  1. Set up performance monitoring dashboards"
echo "  2. Configure performance alerts"
echo "  3. Implement automated performance testing"
echo "  4. Review and optimize identified bottlenecks"

echo ""
echo "🎯 Performance monitor analysis complete!"
echo "📊 Use monitoring data to drive optimization decisions"

exit 0"
}
